'''Strephan I'att''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who was the co-founder of [[I'att Armament]], along with his wife, [[Augusta I'att|Augusta]] in [[Il Avali]], [[Druckenwell/Legends|Druckenwell]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. With a length of [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] service under his belt, that was precisely whom he sold his weapons to.

==Biography==
The most significant creation of his was an [[anti-energy field]] prototype co-developed with the [[Daye Azur-Jamin|lover]] of his granddaughter [[Tinian I'att Azur-Jamin|Tinian]].

I'att was planning to retire to [[Geridard]] with his wife when the successful presentation of the invention prompted [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Eisen Kerioth|Kerioth]] to order the family to [[Doldur]] where he could directly oversee the manufacture of the technology with the intent on personally passing it on to [[Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] as his own. When Strephan refused, he was executed alongside his wife by the Moff's [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] escort.

{{Char-stub}}
